title: Bridge Essay: 'Becoming human again': Exploring connections between nature and recovery from stress and post-traumatic distress.
concept: Ecological self — neuroscience of nature connectedness, biophilia as evolved interoceptive resonance.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecological self — neuroscience of nature connectedness, biophilia as evolved interoceptive resonance.

**'Becoming human again': Exploring connections between nature and recovery from stress and post-traumatic distress.** - Work (Reading, Mass.) (2015). DOI: 10.3233/WOR-141934. PMID: 25167913. BACKGROUND: Many military veterans are seeking ways beyond conventional treatments to manage their stress injuries. An increasing number is turning to nature, including hiking and fishing, farming and gardening, and building relationships with dogs or horses. Many continue to benefit from medication and therapy, but find that nature provides an additional measure of support, relief and healing in their lives.
